title: Shark Spartan GT Matte Black

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner

technical_analysis: The Shark Spartan GT utilizes a proprietary Carbon Fiber Composite shell construction that significantly reduces overall mass while maintaining superior impact resistance compared to traditional polycarbonate shells. This material choice allows for a more aggressive aerodynamic profile without compromising structural integrity, resulting in reduced drag coefficients at high speeds. The internal EPS liner is engineered with variable-density zones to optimize energy absorption during frontal and side-impact scenarios, adhering strictly to the latest ECE 22.06 safety standards.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of aggressive styling and everyday practicality with the Shark Spartan GT in a striking Matte Black finish. Designed for riders who demand uncompromising protection without sacrificing comfort, this helmet features an aerodynamic shape that slices through the wind while keeping you cool during long rides. The matte texture not only looks premium but also resists fingerprints and minor scratches, ensuring your gear stays pristine.
yoast_metadesc: Review of the Shark Spartan GT Matte Black full-face motorcycle helmet. Features carbon fiber composite shell, ECE 22.06 certification, and advanced aerodynamics for under $400.
